title: Falcon-X: a Time Series Foundation Model for Heterogeneous Multivariate Modeling
abstract: We introduce a Falcon foundation model for time series forecasting and heterogeneous multivariate modeling.
notes: Falcon is a model name here, not the lattice signature scheme.

title: Practical Anonymous Two-Party Gradient Boosting Decision Tree
abstract: This work studies privacy-preserving machine learning for anonymous two-party computation and secure gradient boosting decision trees.
notes: Privacy-preserving ML should not become AI4Lattice without lattice or cryptanalysis evidence.

title: A Generic Transformer Foundation Model for Scientific Time Series
abstract: We train a neural foundation model for forecasting and representation learning on scientific time series.
forbidden_sections: BKZ / LLL / G6K / Lattice Reduction / Attacks
notes: Generic AI without lattice/LWE/cryptanalysis anchors stays in watchlist.

title: Fast Private Information Retrieval for Cloud Databases
abstract: A PIR protocol improves client privacy for database queries using communication-efficient secure retrieval.
notes: PIR is routed to general privacy unless lattice/PQC evidence appears.

title: Production Implementation Audit for Distributed Systems
abstract: We audit implementation bugs, software performance, and benchmark regressions in production distributed systems.
notes: Implementation evidence alone should not imply PQC.

title: Transformer for LWE Coordinate Selection
abstract: A neural Transformer is used as an AI-assisted lattice cryptanalysis subroutine for LWE coordinate selection.
notes: Explicit Transformer + LWE + lattice cryptanalysis should trigger AI4Lattice and LWE.

title: BKZ Attack on Sparse LWE with Hybrid Guessing
abstract: The paper studies sparse LWE, BKZ cost estimates, dual attack, primal attack, and hybrid attack strategies.
expected_sections: BKZ / LLL / G6K / Lattice Reduction / Attacks
notes: No AI/ML terms are present, so attack + LWE should not trigger AI4Lattice.

title: ML-DSA Production Implementation Audit
abstract: We audit constant-time behavior, side-channel leakage, and fault handling in Dilithium and ML-DSA implementations.
notes: PQC scheme plus implementation/security evidence should trigger both sections.

title: Module-SIS Chameleon Hash Commitments
abstract: A lattice-based commitment and chameleon hash construction from the Module-SIS assumption.
notes: Module-SIS primitive case should stay in SIS/NTRU/commitment section.

title: Falcon Signature Implementation on Embedded Devices
abstract: Constant-time implementation and side-channel evaluation of the Falcon post-quantum signature scheme.
notes: Falcon with signature and implementation context should trigger PQC and implementation sections.
